import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    BALL, PYRAMID, HEX = 3, 5, 11
    BLUE, GREEN, YELLOW = 3, 2, 5

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    prev_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    next_pos = next_state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)

    prev_holding_green = (state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    next_holding_green = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    prev_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0)
    next_empty = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == 0)

    pickup_event = prev_empty & next_holding_green
    putdown_event = prev_holding_green & next_empty

    bp_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    bp_count = jnp.sum(bp_mask)
    bp_y = jnp.sum(yy * bp_mask) / jnp.maximum(bp_count, 1)
    bp_x = jnp.sum(xx * bp_mask) / jnp.maximum(bp_count, 1)

    yh_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yh_count = jnp.sum(yh_mask)
    yh_y = jnp.sum(yy * yh_mask) / jnp.maximum(yh_count, 1)
    yh_x = jnp.sum(xx * yh_mask) / jnp.maximum(yh_count, 1)

    # Phase 1 shaping
    prev_dist_bp = jnp.abs(prev_pos[0] - bp_y) + jnp.abs(prev_pos[1] - bp_x)
    next_dist_bp = jnp.abs(next_pos[0] - bp_y) + jnp.abs(next_pos[1] - bp_x)
    approach_bp = (prev_dist_bp - next_dist_bp) / max_dist

    # Phase 2 shaping
    prev_dist_yh = jnp.abs(prev_pos[0] - yh_y) + jnp.abs(prev_pos[1] - yh_x)
    next_dist_yh = jnp.abs(next_pos[0] - yh_y) + jnp.abs(next_pos[1] - yh_x)
    approach_yh = (prev_dist_yh - next_dist_yh) / max_dist

    # Green ball on grid check
    green_ball_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    gb_count = jnp.sum(green_ball_mask)
    gb_y = jnp.sum(yy * green_ball_mask) / jnp.maximum(gb_count, 1)
    gb_x = jnp.sum(xx * green_ball_mask) / jnp.maximum(gb_count, 1)
    dist_gb_yh = jnp.abs(gb_y - yh_y) + jnp.abs(gb_x - yh_x)

    # Task success: green ball on grid adjacent to yellow hex (persistent check)
    task_success = (gb_count > 0) & (yh_count > 0) & (dist_gb_yh <= 1.5)
    
    # Previous state task success
    prev_green_ball_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    prev_gb_count = jnp.sum(prev_green_ball_mask)
    prev_gb_y = jnp.sum(yy * prev_green_ball_mask) / jnp.maximum(prev_gb_count, 1)
    prev_gb_x = jnp.sum(xx * prev_green_ball_mask) / jnp.maximum(prev_gb_count, 1)
    prev_yh_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    prev_yh_count = jnp.sum(prev_yh_mask)
    prev_yh_y = jnp.sum(yy * prev_yh_mask) / jnp.maximum(prev_yh_count, 1)
    prev_yh_x = jnp.sum(xx * prev_yh_mask) / jnp.maximum(prev_yh_count, 1)
    prev_dist_gb_yh = jnp.abs(prev_gb_y - prev_yh_y) + jnp.abs(prev_gb_x - prev_yh_x)
    prev_task_success = (prev_gb_count > 0) & (prev_yh_count > 0) & (prev_dist_gb_yh <= 1.5)
    
    just_completed = task_success & ~prev_task_success

    # Adjacency bonus: agent is next to hex while holding green ball
    next_adj_hex = next_holding_green & (next_dist_yh <= 2.0) & (yh_count > 0)
    prev_adj_hex = prev_holding_green & (prev_dist_yh <= 2.0) & (yh_count > 0)
    just_adj_hex = next_adj_hex & ~prev_adj_hex

    r = jnp.float32(0.0)

    # Phase 1: approach blue pyramid
    r = r + jnp.where(~prev_holding_green & (bp_count > 0), approach_bp * 1.0, jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Pickup milestone
    r = r + jnp.where(pickup_event, jnp.float32(3.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Phase 2: approach yellow hex while holding green ball
    r = r + jnp.where(prev_holding_green & (yh_count > 0), approach_yh * 1.0, jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Adjacency bonus
    r = r + jnp.where(just_adj_hex, jnp.float32(1.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Task completion (one-time large bonus)
    r = r + jnp.where(just_completed, jnp.float32(10.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Persistent small reward for task being complete
    r = r + jnp.where(task_success, jnp.float32(0.1), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Wrong putdown penalty
    wrong_putdown = putdown_event & ~task_success
    r = r + jnp.where(wrong_putdown, jnp.float32(-1.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    return r.astype(jnp.float32)
